title: For a Funeral
body: Lord, today we bury them. The body is in the ground, or the flame, or the sea. The soul is with You. The grief is with us. Be with the family. Be with the friend. Be with the one who did not get to say the thing. Be the resurrection, in the middle of the death. Hold us, in the church, in the line, in the car, in the bed at night. We will see them again. We will. Amen.
